summary: Smooths CHOP channel values over time using various filter types (lowpass, spring, etc.). Essential for removing jitter from sensors, audio, or noisy inputs.

key_params.name: filtertype
key_params.note: Filter algorithm: Gaussian, Box, Edge Detect, or custom

key_params.name: filterwidth
key_params.note: Width/duration of the smoothing window in seconds or samples

key_params.name: resetcondition
key_params.note: When to reset the filter state

common_gotchas: Higher filter width adds more lag — balance smoothness vs. responsiveness for real-time control.
Filter introduces latency proportional to the filter width; for zero-latency smoothing use a Lag CHOP instead.
